title: zinnia tenella
intro: Zinnia tenella, also known as Zinnia elegans or Mexican zinnia, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Zinnia tenella include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and support skin health, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and its flowers can be used as a natural dye.
